story.title: Turbocharged
story.logline: In a gritty urban world, a high-stakes car race becomes the ultimate battleground for revenge and redemption.

acts.label: Introduction
acts.description: Meet Hadi, a skilled driver with a troubled past, as he prepares for the annual car race. Meanwhile, Haider and Iqrash plot to ambush Hadi in a gritty urban alleyway.

acts.label: Conflict
acts.description: A calm and rational Hammad intervenes, suggesting that the rivals settle their dispute on the racing track instead of in the alleyway. Hadi, Haider, and Iqrash engage in a high-stakes showdown at the annual car race.

acts.label: Climax
acts.description: As the high-speed mid-race action unfolds, Hadi skillfully drifts past Haider's rugged red car on a sharp corner, leaving him stunned and defeated.

acts.label: Resolution
acts.description: Hadi crosses the finish line in a blur of blue and light, while Haider and Iqrash look on from their cars in stunned defeat, marking the end of Haider's revenge plot and Hadi's triumphant return to the racing world.

story.world: In a world where high-performance cars are a status symbol, the annual car race is the ultimate test of driving skill and strategy.

dialogue.speaker: HAIDER
dialogue.line: "We've been planning this for weeks, Iqrash. Hadi's got a reputation for being untouchable on the track."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of HAIDER, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: IQRASH
dialogue.line: "We're not just going to take him down on the track, Haider. We're going to make it personal."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of IQRASH, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: HADI OFFSCREEN
dialogue.visual_cue: Wide shot of Haider, his red racing jacket highlighted by the alleyway lights, Iqrash's black hoodie blending into the shadows.

dialogue.speaker: HAIDER
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of HAIDER, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: HAMMAD
dialogue.line: "Wait, let's not do this. There's an annual car race coming up. Why don't we settle it there?"
dialogue.visual_cue: Hadi steps into the light, his face set with a determined expression, Hadi's sleek blue car parked behind him, the metallic blue paint gleaming in the alleyway lights.

dialogue.speaker: HAIDER
dialogue.line: "And put ourselves at the mercy of the judges? No way."
dialogue.visual_cue: Hammad's glasses and grey sweater make him stand out against the dark alleyway, Hadi and Haider exchange a skeptical look.

dialogue.speaker: HADI
dialogue.line: "I've got the edge I need. Time to take these guys down."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of HADI, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: HAMMAD
dialogue.line: "Good luck, Hadi. I'll be rooting for you."
dialogue.visual_cue: Hadi's gloved hands tighten the engine bolts, his blue racing suit a stark contrast to the metallic blue car, the garage lights shining down on the car's sleek lines.

dialogue.speaker: ANNOUNCER VO
dialogue.line: "Welcome to the annual city car race! Your drivers include Hadi in the sleek blue car, Haider in the rugged red car, and many more!"
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of ANNOUNCER (V.O.), expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: HADI
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of HADI, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: HAIDER
dialogue.line: "No way! I'm not letting you win!"
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of Hadi's hands on the wheel, his blue racing suit a blur as the car drifts around the corner, Haider's rugged red car close behind.

dialogue.speaker: HADI
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of HADI, expression intense and focused.

characters.name: HAIDER
characters.personality: Haider is a confident and driven individual who isn't afraid to speak his mind and assert his dominance on the track. He's a natural-born leader who values independence and self-reliance.
characters.appearance: Haider is a lean and athletic young man with a strong jawline and piercing eyes, dressed in sleek and modern racing attire.
characters.style_reference: High-octane, neon-drenched urban thriller, think 'Tron' meets 'The Fast and the Furious'
